data.name: Home_HeroSubtitle
data.value: Official telemetry platform for Cosmic Diner. Explore live community activity, global performance insights, and your personal player profile.

data.name: Home_CommunitySessionsDescription
data.value: Total matches and telemetry sessions recorded.

data.name: Sidebar_GuestDescription
data.value: Explore the platform and create your account to unlock your operator profile.

data.name: Sidebar_UserDescription
data.value: Your personal player block lives in Home. Use it as your entry point into the platform.

data.name: Sidebar_AdminDescription
data.value: Administrative access enabled. Internal telemetry modules are available.

data.name: Dashboard_HeroSubtitle
data.value: Live monitoring of sessions, installations, and operational game telemetry.

data.name: Dashboard_KpiRegisteredInstallationsSubtitle
data.value: Persisted in SQL Server through the API

data.name: Dashboard_KpiActiveSessionsSubtitle
data.value: Current active sessions reported by the backend

data.name: LiveOps_HeroSubtitle
data.value: Real-time fleet status, active sessions, event volume and operational alerts.

data.name: LiveOps_NoInstallationsDescription
data.value: Installation cards will appear when Unity clients connect.

data.name: Alerts_HeroSubtitle
data.value: Centralized monitoring of automatic alerts generated by anomalies and critical telemetry events.

data.name: Analytics_HeroSubtitle
data.value: Aggregated gameplay telemetry metrics calculated directly in SQL Server.

data.name: Analytics_NoDataDescription
data.value: No session events match the selected build and date range.

data.name: Builds_HeroSubtitle
data.value: Centralized registry of monitored Cosmic Diner builds and release versions.

data.name: Builds_SearchPlaceholder
data.value: Search by Version Number or Engine Version

data.name: Installations_HeroSubtitle
data.value: Centralized inventory of registered devices and hardware profiles captured from Cosmic Diner installations.

data.name: Installations_SearchPlaceholder
data.value: Search by Installation ID or Device Name

data.name: ProfileSessionDetail_HeroSubtitle
data.value: Technical summary and chronological event timeline for a Cosmic Diner session linked to your owned installation.

data.name: ProfileSessionDetail_NoEventsDescription
data.value: This session exists, but the Unity client has not reported gameplay events for it yet.

data.name: ProfileSessionDetail_TimelineDescription
data.value: Ordered gameplay telemetry events received from the Cosmic Diner Unity client.

data.name: ProfileSessions_HeroSubtitle
data.value: Review gameplay sessions linked exclusively to your owned Cosmic Diner installations.

data.name: ProfileSessions_NoSessionsDescription
data.value: Once your linked Cosmic Diner installations start sending telemetry, your personal session history will appear here.

data.name: Profile_HeroSubtitle
data.value: Premium player profile for Cosmic Diner telemetry ownership and personal gameplay visibility.

data.name: Profile_LinkSubtitle
data.value: Paste the Installation ID shown by the game client to link that device to your Echo Console profile. The user identifier is read from your secure session and is never submitted by the browser.

data.name: Profile_NoLinkedDevicesDescription
data.value: Paste the Installation ID from Cosmic Diner in the ownership panel above to link your first device.

data.name: Profile_OwnedDevicesSubtitle
data.value: These devices are currently linked to your Echo Console account through the ownership system.

data.name: Profile_SettingsSubtitle
data.value: Update your public operator identity. Role and account status are protected system fields and cannot be modified here.

data.name: Profile_UnlinkConfirm
data.value: This will unlink the device from your account. Historical sessions will be preserved. Continue?

data.name: SessionEvents_HeroSubtitle
data.value: Administrative view of gameplay telemetry events received from every Cosmic Diner installation.

data.name: SessionEvents_NoEventsDescription
data.value: No session events match the current administrative filters.

data.name: SessionTimeline_HeroSubtitle
data.value: Chronological reconstruction of the gameplay events received during this Cosmic Diner session.

data.name: SessionTimeline_NoEventsDescription
data.value: This session exists, but the Unity client did not send timeline events.

data.name: SessionTimeline_TimelineDescription
data.value: Events are ordered from the beginning of the session to the most recent telemetry point.

data.name: Users_HeroSubtitle
data.value: Administrative directory of system users, roles, and account states for the EchoConsole platform.

data.name: Presentation_EnableDescription
data.value: Hide secondary chrome and enlarge the dashboard for a live presentation.

data.name: Auth_LoginDescription
data.value: Sign in to access the Echo Console platform and continue into the telemetry control experience.

data.name: Auth_RegisterDescription
data.value: Create a local account to build your player profile inside the Echo Console platform.

data.name: Auth_AliasAlreadyUsed
data.value: This alias is already in use.

data.name: Auth_RegistrationFailed
data.value: The account could not be created. Review the form and try again.

data.name: Auth_PasswordRequiresDigit
data.value: The password must include a number.

data.name: Auth_PasswordRequiresLower
data.value: The password must include a lowercase letter.

data.name: Auth_PasswordRequiresUpper
data.value: The password must include an uppercase letter.

data.name: Auth_PasswordRequiresSymbol
data.value: The password must include a symbol.

data.name: Auth_AccessDeniedDescription
data.value: Your current account does not have the required administrator privileges to access this telemetry module.

data.name: Error_Title
data.value: The control station encountered an error

data.name: Error_Description
data.value: The requested operation could not be completed. Retry the request or return to the home module.

data.name: Validation_Email
data.value: The {0} field is not a valid email address.

data.name: Validation_MaxLength
data.value: The {0} field must be a string with a maximum length of {1}.

data.name: Validation_StringLength
data.value: The {0} field must be a string with a minimum length of {2} and a maximum length of {1}.

data.name: Footer_Description
data.value: Cosmic Diner is an analog-horror exploration game set inside an abandoned retro-futuristic restaurant. Follow the official channels for development signals and new transmissions.

data.name: Footer_LinkPending
data.value: Configure the official URL in ExternalLinks settings.

data.name: Home_CommercialHeroDescription
data.value: The lights are failing. The kitchen is silent. Something in the dining room is still waiting for service. Enter an abandoned space-age restaurant and survive the transmission.

data.name: Home_WishlistButton
data.value: Add Cosmic Diner to your Wishlist

data.name: Home_LiveReadoutDescription
data.value: Echo Console is receiving operational telemetry from active Cosmic Diner installations.

data.name: Home_ShowcaseTitle
data.value: A diner built for the stars. Abandoned for a reason.

data.name: Home_ShowcaseIntro
data.value: Replace the terminal placeholders with final gameplay captures. The layout is ready for cinematic screenshots, environmental storytelling and store-page copy.

data.name: Home_ShowcaseOneTitle
data.value: Your shift begins after closing time

data.name: Home_ShowcaseOneDescription
data.value: Explore a retro-futuristic restaurant frozen in the remains of the space race. Search offices, storage rooms and silent dining halls while the building reacts to your presence.

data.name: Home_ShowcaseOneAlt
data.value: Gameplay screenshot placeholder showing the Cosmic Diner interior

data.name: Home_ShowcaseTwoTitle
data.value: Light is a tool, a warning and a risk

data.name: Home_ShowcaseTwoDescription
data.value: Manage batteries, restore failing systems and use the flashlight carefully. Every powered circuit reveals another part of the diner, and may reveal you in return.

data.name: Home_ShowcaseTwoAlt
data.value: Gameplay screenshot placeholder showing a blackout sequence

data.name: Home_ShowcaseThreeTitle
data.value: The astronaut is not part of the attraction

data.name: Home_ShowcaseThreeDescription
data.value: Listen for movement beyond the walls, hide when the route closes and reconstruct what happened through photographs, objects and corrupted recordings.

data.name: Home_ShowcaseThreeAlt
data.value: Gameplay screenshot placeholder showing an enemy encounter

data.name: Home_ChangelogDescription
data.value: These records describe the evolution of the Cosmic Diner videogame, not the Echo Console website.

data.name: Home_ChangelogV01Description
data.value: Initial exploration loop, diner navigation, object interaction and the first playable progression route.

data.name: Home_ChangelogV02Description
data.value: Flashlight and battery systems, dynamic physical props, power restoration and environmental audio feedback.

data.name: Home_ChangelogV03Description
data.value: Enemy encounters, hiding logic, tension systems and expanded narrative evidence throughout the restaurant.

data.name: Home_CorruptedData
data.value: [// DATA_CORRUPTED: WE ARE WAITING FOR YOU //]

data.name: PatchNotesAdmin_Subtitle
data.value: Create a new Cosmic Diner update and transmit it through Echo Console to the public patch archive.

data.name: PatchNotesAdmin_DescriptionPlaceholder
data.value: Describe the gameplay changes, fixes and new systems included in this version.

data.name: PatchNotesAdmin_PublishNotice
data.value: This transmission will be published immediately.

data.name: PatchNotesAdmin_ProtocolOne
data.value: Version identifiers must be unique. Existing versions are rejected by the API.

data.name: PatchNotesAdmin_ProtocolTwo
data.value: Categories are normalized to uppercase and tone values are restricted to green, amber or rose.

data.name: PatchNotesAdmin_ProtocolThree
data.value: The API assigns the UTC publication timestamp and the landing page reads only published records.

data.name: PatchNotesAdmin_Error
data.value: The patch note could not be published.

data.name: PatchNotesAdmin_DashboardSubtitle
data.value: Review every stored Cosmic Diner update, publish new transmissions and remove incorrect records from the local CMS.

data.name: PatchNotesAdmin_EmptyDescription
data.value: The SQLite archive is empty. Create the first patch note to populate the public landing page.

data.name: PatchNotesAdmin_DeleteConfirm
data.value: This operation permanently deletes the patch note. Continue?

data.name: PatchNotesAdmin_DeleteError
data.value: The patch note could not be deleted.

data.name: PatchNotesAdmin_LoadError
data.value: The Patch Notes dashboard could not be loaded.

data.name: PatchNotesAdmin_InvalidId
data.value: The patch note identifier is invalid.

data.name: PatchNotesAdmin_ToggleToHidden
data.value: Hide from the public landing page

data.name: PatchNotesAdmin_ToggleToPublished
data.value: Publish on the public landing page

data.name: PatchNotesAdmin_ToggleError
data.value: The patch note visibility could not be changed.

data.name: SimulationOrchestrator_OrganicDescription
data.value: Random entry, scene transition and exit pulses every 4–8 seconds.

data.name: SimulationOrchestrator_MaintenanceScope
data.value: Identity users, game builds and CMS records are outside this maintenance scope.

data.name: SimulationOrchestrator_ConfirmMassDrop
data.value: Disconnect every active simulated session now?

data.name: SimulationOrchestrator_ConfirmPurge
data.value: Delete all telemetry records generated by PC-Player simulations?

data.name: SimulationOrchestrator_ConfirmWipeFirst
data.value: This will permanently delete every telemetry installation, session, event and alert. Continue?

data.name: SimulationOrchestrator_ConfirmWipeFinal
data.value: FINAL CONFIRMATION: Wipe all telemetry data now?

data.name: SimulationOrchestrator_ConfirmTerminate
data.value: Stop the persistent simulation and disconnect all simulated sessions?

data.name: SimulationOrchestrator_PersistentHint
data.value: Persistent mode remains active across page navigation until terminated.

data.name: Builds_NotesPlaceholder
data.value: Describe relevant changes, fixes, and deployment context.

data.name: Builds_EmptyHint
data.value: Register a build to initialize version telemetry.

data.name: Builds_CreateError
data.value: The build could not be registered.

data.name: Builds_StatusError
data.value: The build status could not be updated.

data.name: Builds_DeleteActiveHint
data.value: Deactivate the production build before deleting it.

data.name: Builds_DeleteTelemetryHint
data.value: This build is protected because telemetry records reference it.

data.name: Builds_UpdateError
data.value: The build could not be updated.

data.name: Builds_UpdateValidationError
data.value: Review the build data before saving changes.

data.name: Builds_DeleteActiveBlocked
data.value: The active production build must be deactivated before deletion.

data.name: Builds_DeleteTelemetryBlocked
data.value: The build cannot be deleted while installations or sessions reference it.

data.name: Builds_DeleteNotFound
data.value: The selected build no longer exists.

data.name: Builds_DeleteError
data.value: The build could not be deleted.

data.name: PatchNotesAdmin_EditSubtitle
data.value: Load the current record, adjust its content, and save the transmission without leaving the archive.

data.name: PatchNotesAdmin_EditPublishLabel
data.value: Keep this patch note visible on the public landing page

data.name: PatchNotesAdmin_UpdateError
data.value: The patch note could not be updated.

data.name: PatchNotesAdmin_UpdateValidationError
data.value: The patch note contains invalid data and could not be updated.

data.name: Installations_ReadOnlyNotice
data.value: Hardware telemetry is read-only. Only administrative alias and status can be modified.

data.name: Installations_DeleteConfirm
data.value: Delete this installation and all related telemetry records?

data.name: Installations_UpdateError
data.value: Installation metadata could not be updated.

data.name: Installations_UpdateValidationError
data.value: Alias or administrative status is invalid.

data.name: Installations_DeleteSuccess
data.value: Installation and related telemetry were deleted.

data.name: Alerts_AiDescription
data.value: Runs a deterministic local analysis over recent alert telemetry without calling external AI services.

data.name: Alerts_AiIdle
data.value: > AI analysis ready. Execute the trend engine to inspect the latest telemetry window.

data.name: Alerts_AiProcessing
data.value: > Processing alert vectors and comparing telemetry windows...

data.name: Alerts_DiscordDescription
data.value: Broadcasts the latest unresolved critical and fatal incidents through the configured Discord webhook.

data.name: Alerts_RequestFailed
data.value: The operation could not be completed.

data.name: Alerts_TypeDeleteConfirm
data.value: Delete this error type? Existing alerts will be reassigned to UNCLASSIFIED.

data.name: Alerts_DiscordAutomaticDescription
data.value: Critical and fatal alerts are delivered automatically through the persistent Discord outbox with retry support.

data.name: Alerts_MonitoringScopeHint
data.value: Real-time monitoring. The primary console filters active incidents; the AI engine evaluates accumulated behavior from the last 24 hours.

data.name: Users_StationInspectionHint
data.value: Active Station Inspection: Select an operator to audit the hardware specifications linked to their telemetry sessions.

data.name: Users_NoLinkedStations
data.value: No linked hardware stations were found for this operator.

data.name: SessionEvents_RealtimeHint
data.value: Reactive feed. New telemetry is inserted at the top and the browser retains a maximum of 50 visible rows.

data.name: SessionEvents_TimelineEmpty
data.value: No events were recorded for this session.

data.name: Analytics_ContextBanner
data.value: Intelligence Console: Server-optimized analytical aggregates. Hot zones evaluate the structural stability of Cosmic Diner gameplay.

data.name: Auth_VerifyTerminalDesc
data.value: Enter the six-digit authorization sequence assigned to

data.name: Auth_ForgotPasswordDescription
data.value: Enter the email address associated with your operator account. If it is registered, a secure reset sequence will be dispatched.

data.name: Auth_PasswordResetDispatchGeneric
data.value: If the email is registered, a reset sequence has been dispatched.

data.name: Auth_ResetPasswordDescription
data.value: Create a new password for your Echo Console account.

data.name: Auth_ResetPasswordSucceeded
data.value: Your password was reset successfully. Sign in with your new credential.

data.name: Auth_ResetPasswordInvalidOrExpired
data.value: The password reset authorization is invalid or has expired.

data.name: Auth_PasswordConfirmationMismatch
data.value: The password confirmation does not match.

data.name: Profile_DashboardDescription
data.value: Live gameplay telemetry, current connection state and your Cosmic Diner activity summary.

data.name: Profile_SettingsDescription
data.value: Manage your identity, credentials, authenticated sessions and linked Cosmic Diner hardware.

data.name: Profile_NoLocalPassword
data.value: This account uses an external provider and does not have a local password.

data.name: Profile_ConfirmTerminateOthers
data.value: Terminate every other authenticated browser session?

data.name: Profile_ConfirmUnlinkDevice
data.value: Remove this device from your player inventory?

data.name: Profile_DangerDescription
data.value: Deleting your profile removes the account and authentication sessions permanently. Historical game telemetry remains detached from the deleted account.

data.name: Profile_DeleteModalDescription
data.value: Complete both confirmation steps. Enter your current password and type DELETE MY PROFILE exactly.

data.name: Profile_DeleteAcknowledgement
data.value: I understand that this action permanently deletes my Echo Console account.

data.name: Profile_DeleteFirstConfirmation
data.value: Open the permanent account deletion protocol?

data.name: Profile_DeleteSecondConfirmation
data.value: Final confirmation: permanently delete this player profile?

data.name: Profile_Error_InvalidAlias
data.value: Alias must contain 3 to 32 letters, numbers, spaces, hyphens or underscores.

data.name: Profile_Error_InvalidAvatar
data.value: The selected avatar does not belong to the approved catalog.

data.name: Profile_Error_InvalidTheme
data.value: The selected terminal theme does not belong to the approved catalog.

data.name: Profile_Error_InvalidLanguage
data.value: The selected language is not supported.

data.name: Profile_Error_AliasUsed
data.value: The selected alias is already assigned to another player.

data.name: Profile_Error_UpdateFailed
data.value: The player identity could not be updated.

data.name: Profile_Error_NoLocalPassword
data.value: This account does not have a local password.

data.name: Profile_Error_PasswordChange
data.value: The password could not be changed.

data.name: Profile_Error_SessionNotFound
data.value: The requested session was not found.

data.name: Profile_Error_CurrentSession
data.value: The current browser session cannot be revoked from this command.

data.name: Profile_RemoteSessionsTerminated
data.value: All other authenticated sessions were terminated.

data.name: Profile_Error_InvalidInstallation
data.value: A valid installation identifier is required.

data.name: Profile_Error_ClaimFailed
data.value: The hardware could not be linked.

data.name: Profile_Error_InstallationNotFound
data.value: The requested installation was not found.

data.name: Profile_Error_InstallationNotOwned
data.value: This installation is not linked to the current player.

data.name: Profile_DeviceUnlinked
data.value: The device was removed from the player inventory.

data.name: Profile_Error_DeletePhrase
data.value: The deletion confirmation phrase does not match.

data.name: Profile_Error_DeleteRequiresPassword
data.value: A local password is required to delete this profile.

data.name: Profile_Error_DeleteFailed
data.value: The player profile could not be deleted.

data.name: Profile_Error_Validation
data.value: One or more fields are invalid.

data.name: Profile_GenericError
data.value: The operation could not be completed.
